items.html: A further rule also emerges for us: no MAN [Mayin Nukvin] avail and are detained there except two times — one, the first time, when they rose; and two, the second time, when they were depicted; but afterwards they leave there. However, their first MAN, which were in the world each and every one in its place, in the secret of firstborn sons — as, for example, ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] to AVI [Aba ve Ima], being their firstborn MAN — are never absent from there. And it is impossible for any MAN to rise from there onward, until the completion of the clarification of all the 288 sparks of the Melachim [kings], until the days of the Messiah, except by means of them. Therefore there must be new MAN in every Zivug [coupling]: for when they rise, they are promptly corrected at the second time, and then others rise to be corrected as well. And so it proceeds until all the Melachim are completed in their clarification — and then the Messiah will come, with God's help.
